name: Peralez Penthouse
description:
After the events with SSI and their election win, the Peralezes decided it was time for a change.
They moved to a new home, leaving this one behind… and in a gesture of gratitude, gifted it to you, V, for all you did.
It’s yours now — a quiet place in the hills… mostly quiet.
But tell me, have you noticed that he is watching
